title: Badge Component
content:
The Badge component is a reusable UI element designed to display status, labels, or categories. It leverages `class-variance-authority` for flexible styling based on variants.

## Key Exports

- **Badge**: The main React component for rendering a badge.
- **badgeVariants**: The `cva` function used to define the styling variants for the badge.

## Props

- **variant**: Controls the visual style of the badge. Accepts `default`, `secondary`, `destructive`, or `outline`.
- **className**: Allows for additional custom styling classes.
- Other standard `div` element props are also supported.

## Usage Example

```jsx
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';

function Example() {
  return (
    <>
      <Badge>Default</Badge>
      <Badge variant="secondary">Secondary</Badge>
      <Badge variant="destructive">Destructive</Badge>
      <Badge variant="outline">Outline</Badge>
    </>
  );
}
```
